tasks.subject: Task 1: zsh/.zshrc + zsh/mkdirp structural sync
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rebuild `zsh/.zshrc` byte-identical to `c8a74a6` for all 55 carried regions (init consolidation, fold markers, js/* split, :ssh-init, new postgresql section, ruby markers, .local/bin moved to EOF), preserving the fork's claude deviation; create extracted `zsh/mkdirp`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `zsh/.zshrc`
- Create: `zsh/mkdirp`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `diff zsh/.zshrc <(git show hollow/main:zsh/.zshrc)` shows zero `<` (fork-side) lines; only `>` hunks for the 15 omitted regions, the 3 claude sync lines, and the .envrc block.
- [ ] `zsh/mkdirp` byte-identical to `git show hollow/main:zsh/mkdirp`.
- [ ] `grep -c 'local dst=.*claude_desktop_config' zsh/.zshrc` -> 0 (claude deviation preserved).
- [ ] `grep -c 'alias X' zsh/.zshrc` -> 0; no `zsh/X` file.
- [ ] File ends with `add path "${HOME}/.local/bin"` + single newline (no trailing blank, no .envrc block).
- [ ] `zsh -n zsh/.zshrc` and `zsh -n zsh/mkdirp` pass.

**Verify:** `diff zsh/.zshrc <(git show hollow/main:zsh/.zshrc) | grep -c '^<'` -> 0 AND `zsh -n zsh/.zshrc && echo OK`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["zsh/.zshrc", "zsh/mkdirp"], "verifyCommand": "diff zsh/.zshrc <(git show hollow/main:zsh/.zshrc) | grep -c '^<'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["0 fork-side diff lines vs c8a74a6", "zsh/mkdirp byte-identical to upstream", "claude deviation preserved (grep 0)", "no alias X / no zsh/X", ".local/bin is final line", "zsh -n passes for both files"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Brewfile — bun/biome, go/ruby, postgres + vscode exts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add 5 new `brew` lines + 5 new `vscode` extension lines at upstream's relative positions, each byte-identical to c8a74a6.

**Files:**
- Modify: `Brewfile`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `Brewfile` contains `brew "biome"` (after bat), `brew "bun"` (after bottom), `brew "gofumpt"`+`brew "gopls"` (after go), `brew "postgresql@18", link: true` (after poppler), `brew "ruby"` (after rsync).
- [ ] `Brewfile` contains `vscode "biomejs.biome"`, `vscode "golang.go"`, `vscode "oven.bun-vscode"`, `vscode "shopify.ruby-lsp"`, `vscode "sorbet.sorbet-vscode-extension"`.
- [ ] Each new line is byte-identical to its c8a74a6 counterpart.

**Verify:** `grep -cE '^brew "(biome|bun|gofumpt|gopls|postgresql@18|ruby)"' Brewfile` -> 6 AND `grep -cE '^vscode "(biomejs.biome|golang.go|oven.bun-vscode|shopify.ruby-lsp|sorbet.sorbet-vscode-extension)"' Brewfile` -> 5

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Brewfile"], "verifyCommand": "grep -cE '^brew \"(biome|bun|gofumpt|gopls|postgresql@18|ruby)\"' Brewfile", "acceptanceCriteria": ["6 new brew lines present at upstream relative positions", "5 new vscode extension lines present", "every new line byte-identical to c8a74a6", "brew bundle list --all parses"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: vscode/settings.json — per-language format-on-save
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the formatter-feature keys from c8a74a6 (15 [lang] blocks, editor.codeActionsOnSave, go.useLanguageServer, gopls, json.schemaDownload.trustedDomains), values byte-identical, in jq --sort-keys form, preserving the fork's existing curation-outs.

**Files:**
- Modify: `vscode/settings.json`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Valid JSON.
- [ ] `diff <(git show HEAD:vscode/settings.json) vscode/settings.json` shows only additions (`>`), no removals (`<`) of existing keys.
- [ ] Added keys are exactly the 15 [lang] blocks + editor.codeActionsOnSave + go.useLanguageServer + gopls + json.schemaDownload.trustedDomains.
- [ ] Fork's omissions stay absent: `grep -c 'ansible.lightspeed\|files.associations\|makefile.configureOnOpen\|window.commandCenter\|workbench.activityBar\|yaml.customTags' vscode/settings.json` -> 0.
- [ ] Round-trips: `diff vscode/settings.json <(jq -S . vscode/settings.json)` empty.

**Verify:** `jq -e . vscode/settings.json >/dev/null && echo VALID` AND `diff <(git show HEAD:vscode/settings.json) vscode/settings.json | grep -c '^<'` -> 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["vscode/settings.json"], "verifyCommand": "diff <(git show HEAD:vscode/settings.json) vscode/settings.json | grep -c '^<'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["valid JSON", "additions-only vs fork current (0 removals)", "15 [lang] blocks + codeActionsOnSave + go.useLanguageServer + gopls + json.schemaDownload added", "curation-out keys stay absent (grep 0)", "jq -S round-trip empty"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Mark plan tasks complete + whole-ring re-verify
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Flip this plan's checkboxes to done, set .tasks.json statuses, run whole-ring re-verification, commit (final bookkeeping commit before PR).

**Files:**
- Modify: `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-08-zsh-dotfiles-ring14.md`
- Modify: `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-08-zsh-dotfiles-ring14.md.tasks.json`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Task 1-3 checkboxes checked in the plan doc.
- [ ] Task 1-3 statuses = completed in .tasks.json.
- [ ] Whole-ring re-verification passes (all commands in plan Step 1).

**Verify:** the full re-verification block prints all-OK (0 fork-side .zshrc lines, mkdirp OK, syntax OK, 6 brews, 5 vscode, brewfile parses, settings valid + round-trip OK).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-08-zsh-dotfiles-ring14.md", "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-08-zsh-dotfiles-ring14.md.tasks.json"], "verifyCommand": "diff zsh/.zshrc <(git show hollow/main:zsh/.zshrc) | grep -c '^<'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["plan checkboxes checked", ".tasks.json Tasks 1-3 completed", "whole-ring re-verification all-OK"]}
```
